text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 74 

SPIBIF_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Spina Bifida and Other Congenital Anomalies of the Nervous System End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare 
Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for spina bifida and other 
congenital anomalies of the nervous system as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT
